message:
fix: align emit_scheduler_evidence with chosen-action-only expected_loss contract

expected_loss_by_action previously emitted all three lane losses
(meet_deadlines, drain_cancel, process_ready) regardless of which
action was chosen, making the map a three-entry static fixture
rather than decision-relevant evidence. chosen_expected_loss was
hardcoded to 0.0, violating the new franken_evidence validation
that the chosen action must appear in the map with matching loss.

Now emit only the chosen action's loss in expected_loss_by_action
and set chosen_expected_loss to match, satisfying the validation
contract and making the evidence record self-consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
